case_title: BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP vs. RICHARDSON, WILLIAM D. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, WILLIAM D.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP SERVED DEC-23-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, WILLIAM D.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, WILLIAM D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 500 BEALE STREET, SUITE 203, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, WILLIAM D.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, WILLIAM D. DOES ONE THROUGH FIVE, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, WILLIAM D.
